depression.description: I often feel like I'm not good enough, especially when I compare my progress to others. It's hard to shake off the thought that I'm a failure.
I keep putting off tasks, and it feels like I'm stuck in this cycle of procrastination. I know I need to work on my project, but I just can't seem to get started.

depression.topic: Fear of not being productive enough
depression.description: I feel like if I'm not constantly working or being productive, I'm wasting my life. This pressure makes it hard for me to relax or enjoy my free time.
When I think about my life choices, I get really anxious. The fear of making the wrong decision paralyzes me, and I end up overthinking everything.
I feel like there's so much pressure to showcase my work and be successful, especially after my time in Europe. It's exhausting to keep up with these expectations.

Delusion.description: I have this deep-seated belief that I'm incompetent and out of control. It feels like no matter what I do, I'm destined to fail.
I think I have to make the perfect choice every time, or else I'm a failure. This belief makes it impossible for me to move forward with anything.
